BE MADE FERT|LE

pages.raw_text:
The arid land along the Columbia
river south from Kettle Falls will
soon bo under irrigation by water
from the Colvilie river


The Northwestern Irrigation. Power
\ Investment company of Seattle.
which Is back of this enterprise. has
for several weeks past, through
agents. been quietly buying on con-
tract land on the arst bench above
the Columbia river. from Kettle
Falls south for about 35 miles. or to
several miles below Daisy and has
secured several thousand acres.


The farm land which the company
has bought along the Columbia river
is dry and without irrigation II is
practically worthless. When this land
Is irrigated II will be one of the most
wonderfully productive regions In
the state of Washington.


Water will be taken from the Col
Vile about one and ons-half miles
from the mouth and will be carried
in large fumes and canals.


The company proposes to erect
large fruit evaporators and canneries
as soon as possible to use up all the
surplus produce not avaiiabls for
shipment They will also put In op-
Grafton large electric plant and a
trolley limo to connect the steamboat
now In operation on the Columbia
river with some point on the 8. +. &
N. railroad.


1t Is understood that over $1a5. 900
will be expended by the company dur
